overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a medieval European-style city at dusk. The journey traverses narrow cobblestone alleys, ascends a torch-lit stone bridge, passes through a dark tunnel, and descends toward a waterfront, with atmospheric lighting transitioning from mixed natural-artificial to fully artificial torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval alley with half-timbered houses

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at a trot through narrow cobblestone alleyways between medieval buildings

notable_agents.action: villager standing near wooden fence watching the horse pass
child in simple clothing running alongside the horse briefly

entered.detail: traditional medieval timber-framed building with white plaster and dark wooden beams
small garden with red and purple flowers beside the cobblestone path
irregular cobblestone paving stones forming the narrow street
tall stone structure with small lit windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow medieval alley with half-timbered houses lining the path. Geralt rides a horse through the cobblestone street, passing villagers including a child who runs alongside briefly. The environment is dimly lit with warm light emanating from windows, creating an intimate, enclosed atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending cobblestone ramp with stone parapets and burning torches

events.description: exits narrow alley onto ascending cobblestone bridge with open sky view and stone railing

agents.ego_description: riding uphill on a cobblestone ramp alongside a stone parapet lined with burning braziers

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing near stone building holding a torch

entered.detail: stone railing with crenellations running alongside the ascending path
burning fire pit mounted on the stone parapet providing warm orange light
large stone fortress visible on the hilltop against the purple dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open ascending ramp with a stone parapet on the left lined with burning torches. The sky is visible showing a dramatic purple dusk. The character rides uphill toward a distant castle structure, passing a guard standing watch.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone tunnel with torchlit walls and wooden scaffolding

events.description: enters dark tunnel, lighting shifts dramatically to artificial torchlight only
exits tunnel back into open street with visible sky

agents.ego_description: riding through a dark stone tunnel passing villagers carrying torches

notable_agents.action: villager holding a torch walking in the opposite direction through the tunnel

entered.detail: large stone archway marking the entrance to the dark passage
massive stone structure forming the tunnel walls with small windows
temporary wooden construction platforms attached to the tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark stone tunnel, transitioning from mixed lighting to purely artificial torchlight. The enclosed space features stone gatehouse walls and wooden scaffolding. Villagers with torches walk in the opposite direction, their flames casting flickering shadows on the cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval street descending toward waterfront gate

events.description: approaches large archway leading to open waterfront area with visible water

agents.ego_description: riding downhill through medieval streets toward a waterfront archway, passing market stalls

entered.detail: large stone archway opening to the waterfront with view of dark water beyond
wooden cart with canvas covering parked on the cobblestone street
stone steps leading up to a building entrance beside the main path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens to a wider medieval street descending toward a waterfront. The path passes wooden market carts and stone staircases leading to buildings. The character rides toward a large archway that opens to the water, with the dark sea visible beyond the city walls under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a medieval city that transforms from an intimate residential alley into a wide, open waterfront under a darkening sky. It begins with a ride through a narrow cobblestone street lined with half-timbered houses and warm window light, passing villagers in a confined urban space. As the path opens, the camera ascends a stone ramp flanked by burning torches, shifting the perspective toward a dramatic purple dusk and a distant castle. The scene then contracts as the rider enters a dark stone tunnel where the lighting becomes purely artificial, casting flickering shadows against gatehouse walls and wooden scaffolding. Finally, the camera emerges from the tunnel onto a descending street filled with market carts, moving through a large archway that reveals the dark sea beyond the city walls.
